title: Deepslate Generator
description: Turns a cobblestone into a deepslate generator if it is built below y-level 0!
body:
# Deepslate Generator

Turn a cobblestone into a deepslate generator if it is built below y-level 0! A cobblestone generator built below y-level 0 will generate deepslate. Building the exact same above y-level 0 will result in a normal functioning cobblestone generator! No more breaking down caves if you need blocks for your builds!
